evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: The _Tekton Pipelines CLI_ project provides a command-line interface (CLI) for interacting with [Tekton](https://tekton.dev/), an open-source framework for Continuous Integration and Delivery (CI/CD) systems.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: ```shell # Get the tar.xz curl -LO https://github.com/tektoncd/cli/releases/download/v0.44.0/tkn_0.44.0_Darwin_all.tar.gz # Extract tkn to your PATH (e.g. /usr/local/bin) sudo tar xvzf tkn_0.44.0_Darwin_all.tar.gz -C /usr/local/bin tkn ```

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: ```powershell #Create directory New-Item -Path "$HOME/tektoncd/cli" -Type Directory # Download file Start-BitsTransfer -Source https://github.com/tektoncd/cli/releases/download/v0.44.0/tkn_0.44.0_Windows_x86_64.zip -Destination "$HOME/tektoncd/cli/." # Uncompress zip file Expand-Archive $HOME/tektoncd/cli/*.zip -DestinationPath C:\Users\Developer\tektoncd\cli\. #Add to Windows `Environment Variables` [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("Path",$($env:Path + ";$Home\tektoncd\cli"),'User') ```
